description: .NET version upgrade plan from net8.0 to net10.0

tasks.description: Upgrade eShopOnWeb from .NET 8.0 to .NET 10.0 across all source and test projects
tasks.reason: The user explicitly requested an upgrade to .NET 10. Upgrading from .NET 8.0 to .NET 10.0 LTS ensures long-term support beyond the .NET 8 EOL date (November 2026), access to the latest runtime performance improvements, C# language features, and continued alignment with the Microsoft support lifecycle.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade the entire eShopOnWeb solution from net8.0 to net10.0. The target framework is defined centrally in Directory.Packages.props and SDK version in global.json. The upgrade must: (1) update the TargetFramework to net10.0 in Directory.Packages.props, (2) update the SDK version to 10.0.x in global.json, (3) update all NuGet package versions (Microsoft.AspNetCore.*, Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.*, Azure.*, and third-party packages) to net10.0-compatible versions, (4) resolve any breaking API changes between .NET 8 and .NET 10 in source projects (ApplicationCore, Web, BlazorAdmin, BlazorShared, Infrastructure, PublicApi) and test projects (UnitTests, IntegrationTests, PublicApiIntegrationTests, FunctionalTests), and (5) ensure all projects build successfully and all existing tests pass.
